channel.title: KKR — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on KKR (KKR & Co) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED KKR (+20%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added KKR in Q4 2025 · 2.7% of portfolio. Building the new KKR position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Bill Nygren: NEW POSITION KKR · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) new position KKR in Q3 2025 · 2.2% of portfolio. New KKR position — alts.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)
